title: Spotify Earnings Q4 2025 | Rekordgewinne, Führungswechsel & KI-Offensive
description: Diese Episode analysiert Spotifys beeindruckenden Abschluss des Jahres 2025, geprägt von einem Umsatzsprung auf 4,5 Milliarden Euro und einem Rekordzuwachs an Nutzern. Wir beleuchten die strategische Neuausrichtung unter den neuen Co-CEOs Alex Norström und Gustav Söderström, während Gründer Daniel Ek in den Aufsichtsrat wechselt. title: Spotify Pops on Earnings Beat & Inside the "Software-mageddon" Sell-off
description:
Episode 121: Today, Ann discusses Spotify’s latest earnings report and why the streaming giant impressed investors besting expectations with a huge jump in subscribers and revenue.  Then we tackle 2026’s "software-mageddon" sell-off that has investors wondering which companies and products are best insulated from the encroachment of AI - we look at the latest numbers, the market results and even ask Claude what it makes of the sector’s future.

title: Wall Street Blind Spots… Old School Investing Still Works…
description:
Jose Mayora, author of Wall Street's Blind Spots, a new book about the realities of value investing in a market dominated by mega-cap growth stocks, explains that true value investing is not about low P/E ratios but about buying businesses at a meaningful discount to intrinsic value.
 He emphasizes disciplined, bottom-up research, geographic and sector diversification, and concentrated portfolios to uncover overlooked opportunities. We also explore the psychological challenges of investing throu
